ddls:
CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the car */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "model_year" TEXT /* Year the car model was produced */,
  "drive_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drive type */,
  "carburetor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carburetor type */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Style of the car body (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_drive_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_type_id") REFERENCES drive_types ("drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_carburetor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("carburetor_type_id") REFERENCES carburetor_types ("carburetor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_model_year FOREIGN KEY ("model_year") REFERENCES model_years ("year_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the manufacturer was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement (in cubic inches) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "gear_ratio" REAL /* Gear ratio of the transmission */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the car (in thousands of pounds) */,
  "quarter_mile_time" REAL /* Time to complete a quarter-mile (in seconds) */,
  "zero_to_sixty_time" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0-60 mph (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "num_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_types" (
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive type */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive system (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drive type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carburetor_types" (
  "carburetor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carburetor type */,
  "carburetor_type" TEXT /* Type of carburetor (e.g., 1, 2, 4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carburetor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carburetor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the car model was produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "mpg_city" REAL /* City miles per gallon */,
  "mpg_highway" REAL /* Highway miles per gallon */,
  "mpg_combined" REAL /* Combined miles per gallon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement (in cubic inches) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine (in lb-ft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_details" (
  "transmission_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission detail entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "gear_ratio" REAL /* Gear ratio of the transmission */,
  "transmission_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_details_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_details_transmission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_type_id") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the feature (e.g., standard, optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_history" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model affected */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)
